title: War Complications
entries: there is unmatched equipment or resources in play
the problem cannot be solved/defeated by intellect alone
the enemy can constantly disguise or hide itself
the enemy is changing the environment to better suit its needs
it is during a local election
the weather is inhospitable
the enemy is surrounded by nosy people
no one in authority believes the protagonists
this must be resolved on a short timeline that you cannot slow
the enemy is pulling another dimension into an unstable union with this one
the enemy is regenerating its ranks quicker than they can be destroyed
the enemy is seen as a messiah by a multitude of people
the enemy has spies everywhere
the enemy has nature on its side
the enemy hides behind the veil of society
the enemy controls the government
the enemy has the faithful of the region denying their faith
the enemy sends those killed to purgatory
the McGuffin needed to succeed is unknown
it involves an enemy that is guilt-tripping a PC to do what they want done
the PC(s) lose something every time they deviate from the vision they received
the enemy challenges a PC to a test of skill
it will drastically change a character’s understanding about something from their past
the enemy is a master of psychological manipulation and deception
the conflict takes place in a realm where the laws of magic are unpredictable
the enemy has the power to manipulate emotions and turn allies against each other
the conflict involves multiple factions with their own conflicting goals
the enemy possesses an artifact that grants them an overwhelming advantage
the conflict is tied to a prophetic event with cryptic clues and riddles
the enemy is protected by powerful magical wards and barriers
the conflict requires the heroes to make difficult sacrifices or trade-offs
the enemy is a shape-shifter and can take on the appearance of anyone
the conflict is influenced by celestial alignments and astrological phenomena
the enemy has a powerful ally or ally group that intervenes in the conflict
the conflict takes place in a location with a powerful, ancient curse
the enemy has the ability to resurrect fallen allies and continue the fight
the conflict is part of a grand scheme orchestrated by a secretive organization
the enemy has access to forbidden knowledge that grants them unique abilities
the conflict involves a series of interconnected battles or challenges
the enemy is able to drain the life force of their opponents to sustain themselves
the conflict requires the heroes to navigate through treacherous moral dilemmas
the enemy has enlisted the help of deadly and elusive assassins
the conflict takes place in a realm where time flows differently, affecting the outcome
the enemy possesses an ancient artifact that can rewrite reality itself
the conflict involves a competition of wits and strategy, not just brute force
the enemy is a master of curses, hexes, and dark magic
the conflict requires the heroes to form alliances with unlikely or rival factions
the enemy's power is fueled by the fear and despair of the people
the conflict is intertwined with a complex web of prophecies and visions
the enemy has the ability to summon powerful creatures to aid them in battle
the conflict takes place in a realm where time is fractured, leading to temporal anomalies
the enemy is an ancient being with knowledge of the heroes' deepest fears and weaknesses
the conflict involves a race against time to retrieve a lost artifact or stop a cataclysmic event
the enemy has the ability to manipulate the terrain and environment to their advantage
the conflict requires the heroes to delve into the realm of dreams and nightmares
the enemy is a master of forbidden alchemy, creating deadly concoctions and potions
the conflict is affected by a celestial alignment that grants the enemy god-like powers
the enemy has the ability to control the minds of others and turn them into unwilling pawns
the conflict involves a long-forgotten prophecy that foretells the rise of a dark ruler
the enemy possesses ancient relics that grant them control over elemental forces
the conflict requires the heroes to navigate through a labyrinthine maze of traps and puzzles
the enemy has the power to alter reality within a localized area
the conflict is influenced by the celestial cycles of birth, life, death, and rebirth
the enemy has a network of spies and informants, making it difficult to trust anyone
